title: To simpler times
summary: I previously wrote about how this site was built[^1] and then deployed[^2]. I'm quite happy experimenting with how I set up this whole shebang because I can learn a lot from it and the worst that happens is that the site goes down for half an hour. The stakes are low. You might t
